title: process_remote has no SSRF guard on media URLs
description: src/media.rs process_remote checks that the URL starts with http:// or https:// but never calls is_private_host(). Callers pass URLs from untrusted sources: webhook payloads (attacker-controlled) and RSS/Atom enclosure URLs (feed-controlled). A URL like http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ will be fetched without restriction. The is_private_host() helper already exists in server.rs. process_remote must parse the URL, extract the host, and reject private/loopback/link-local addresses before making the request.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
